author: @ThinkingandTinkering
text: The world is truly a fascinating and wonderful place to spend a bit of time in

author: @TheGreenPastures
text:
Happy to see you enjoy not only the Science and Technology parts but also the nature.
You live life to the fullest.
That is the way.
Good example to mankind as we pursue technology advancement, do not forget about the wonders and secret of nature.

author: @IndianaBoys
text: Thanks for sharing.  Discovering Wisdom in Nature Quote: Whenever I have found myself stuck in the ways I relate to things, I return to nature. It is my principal teacher, and I try to open my whole being to what it has to say.  Wynn Bullock
